SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Our Memphis Auto Care Story

Founded in a small garage near Elvis Presley Blvd, Horizon Auto Repair has grown into one of Memphis' most trusted auto service centers. We started with just two lifts and a commitment to fair pricing.

Today, we combine old-school mechanical expertise with the latest diagnostic technology. Our team specializes in domestic and import vehicles commonly seen on Memphis roads, from Chevy trucks to Nissan sedans.

We're proud to support local charities like the Mid-South Food Bank and sponsor youth sports teams in Shelby County.

14+ Years
4,200+ Projects
98% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Horizon Auto Repair

No Upselling

We recommend only what your vehicle truly needs - no unnecessary repairs.

Loaner Cars

Free loaner vehicles available for most major repairs over 4 hours.

3-Year Warranty

All parts and labor backed by our industry-leading warranty.

Local Parts Network

Direct relationships with Memphis-area suppliers mean faster repairs and better pricing.

Schedule Your Service Today

Same-day appointments available for most services. Call or book online.

Get a Free Estimate Call 555-aut-r90

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

After two shops told me I needed a $4,000 replacement, Horizon diagnosed a bad solenoid pack. $600 repair fixed my shifting issues completely. They even showed me the faulty part and explained how the repair works. My truck shifts better than it has in years.

Marcus J. Transmission rebuild for 2014 Silverado
“

My AC would only blow cold on the highway - turns out the condenser fan was failing. Horizon found the issue quickly and had me back on the road same day. The tech took time to show me the melted wiring that caused the problem. Great service in this Memphis heat!

Lisa T. AC repair for 2017 Camry
“

Finally found a shop that doesn't try to upsell rotors when they can be resurfaced. My brakes are silent now and stop perfectly, even in rainy downtown traffic. Appreciate the honest assessment and quality workmanship.

Darnell W. Brake job for 2018 Explorer
“

My Subaru had an intermittent misfire three other shops couldn't replicate. Horizon's technician rode with me to pinpoint the issue - turned out to be a wiring harness rubbing against the engine. Detailed invoice showed exactly what was fixed. Will never go anywhere else.

Sarah K. Diagnostics for check engine light
“

Had a horrible clunking noise over bumps. Horizon replaced both front struts and control arm bushings, then did a perfect alignment. Car drives like new now, even on those rough streets near the Medical District. Fair price and no hidden fees.

James P. Suspension repair for 2012 Altima
“

Paid for their thorough 125-point inspection before buying a used Tahoe. They found $2,800 in needed repairs the dealer 'forgot' to mention. Negotiated the repair cost off the price and had Horizon do the work. Saved me from a bad purchase!

Elena R. Pre-purchase inspection

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I service my transmission?
We recommend fluid changes every 30,000 miles for most Memphis drivers. Heavy stop-and-go traffic may require more frequent service.
What are signs my transmission is failing?
Delayed shifting, slipping gears, and fluid leaks are common warnings. Don't wait until you're stuck on Summer Avenue - bring your car in at the first sign of trouble.
Can you work on European transmissions?
Yes, our lead technician is certified on BMW, Mercedes, and Audi transmissions commonly found in East Memphis neighborhoods.
